footer.beschreibung: Restaurant, snack bar & Der Kotten in the heart of nature — at the campsite in Tecklenburg-Leeden.

kontakt.reservierenText: We're happy to take your reservation by phone or WhatsApp.

events.leer: No dates are planned at the moment. Check back soon!

hero.subtitle: At Capfun holiday park Tecklenburg-Leeden
hero.text: Great food, a cosy atmosphere and evenings full of music — in the heart of nature. Whether it's a fine dinner at the restaurant, a quick bite at the snack bar or an event night at the Kotten: guests from the region and the park are warmly welcome.
hero.kottenChip: You can also rent the Kotten for your own celebration

restaurant.text: Refined, seasonal cuisine in a cosy country-house atmosphere — for external guests and private parties.
restaurant.alt: Cosily set dining room in the restaurant of Das Landhaus

imbiss.text: Quick, fresh and easy — fries, currywurst & more for in between.
imbiss.alt: Counter of the snack bar at Das Landhaus with fresh snacks

kotten.text: Our event barn: DJ nights, karaoke and themed evenings — and available to rent for private celebrations.
kotten.alt: Der Kotten from outside — the event barn of Das Landhaus in nature

entdecken.text: Whether a fine dinner, a quick snack or an exuberant night of dancing — everyone finds their place here.

anfahrt.text: Nestled in nature, easy to reach from Osnabrück, Münster and Bielefeld.

hero.text: Seasonal cuisine, regional produce and a place to feel at home — with us, dining becomes an experience.

willkommen.text: At Das Landhaus we cook with attention to detail: fresh, seasonal ingredients, honest dishes and a warm atmosphere where you'll happily linger. Whether for a family meal, a romantic evening or with friends — guests from further afield are warmly welcome too.
willkommen.bildAlt: Dining room with counter in the restaurant of Das Landhaus

items.text: We cook with what the season offers — fresh produce from the region, short distances, honest flavour.
From starter to dessert, we make as much as possible ourselves — with time and love for detail.
Whether a guest from the holiday park or a visitor from the region — you're warmly welcome.

gesellschaft.text: On closing days we host the whole restaurant privately for you — from a family celebration to a company dinner or an intimate gathering. Talk to us about menu, number of guests and date.
gesellschaft.ctaText: Tell us about your occasion — we'll get back to you with menu ideas, availability and options. Quickest by phone or WhatsApp.

hero.text: Quick, fresh and tasty — for a little hunger in between or straight to take away.

imbiss.intro: No time for a long menu? Our snack bar serves campers and visitors with classics fresh off the grill and out of the fryer — easy-going and at fair prices.
imbiss.platzhalterAlt: Snack bar (placeholder photo — will be replaced by a real one)

hero.text: Our event barn with an outdoor stage: DJ nights, karaoke, live music and themed evenings — and on quiet days the perfect spot for your own celebration.

intro.p1: The Kotten is the sociable heart of Das Landhaus — our event barn in the heart of nature. DJs spin here, people sing along at karaoke and celebrate at themed nights. Guests from across the region come together to dance, laugh and enjoy an unforgettable evening.
intro.p2: In good weather the music moves outside: our outdoor stage hosts live music under the open sky, right in the middle of nature.
intro.p3: And when there's no public event, you can rent the Kotten for your own celebration — from a birthday party to a company event.
intro.bildAlt: Der Kotten from outside — the event barn of Das Landhaus

formate.text: Regular, loud and sociable — and on quiet days entirely yours for your own celebration.

items.text: When the sound system cranks up, the barn becomes a dance floor — from chart hits to party classics.
Grab the mic, be brave: karaoke nights where everyone becomes a star.
From Schlager to Oktoberfest — themed nights with matching music and decoration.

mietenKarte.textVorPersonen: On closing days the Kotten is all yours — birthday, company or family celebration. Room for up to

mieten.text: On closing days the Kotten becomes entirely your space. Whether a milestone birthday, company party, club or family celebration — we create the right setting for private events.
mieten.ctaText: Tell us about your occasion — we'll get back to you with availability and options. Quickest by phone or WhatsApp.

hero.text: Live music, Schlager nights, themed evenings and more — find all the dates at Das Landhaus here.

eventDetail.ctaText: For many events a reservation is recommended. Get in touch by phone or WhatsApp.

hero.text: A few impressions of Das Landhaus, the Kotten and the surrounding nature.
At Capfun holiday park Tecklenburg-Leeden, nestled in nature — easy to reach from the surrounding area. We look forward to your visit.

anfahrt.anfahrtText: Das Landhaus is located in the Capfun holiday park in Tecklenburg-Leeden, easy to reach from the whole surrounding area — around an hour each from Osnabrück, Münster and Bielefeld. Parking is available right on site.
